rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd/... -run "TestInstallProject_InTreeLinks|TestInstallProject_ConventionLinks|TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode" -timeout 60s

All three bead ACs are already satisfied by prior bead ddx-06f820f4 (commit 92b4821c4):

AC1 — TestInstallProject_InTreeLinks in cli/cmd/install_global_test.go
  Verifies ddx install (no --global, in-tree mode) installs to <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/
  and creates project-tier links under <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and <project>/.agents/skills/<name>.
  PASSES.

AC2 — TestInstallProject_ConventionLinks in cli/cmd/install_global_test.go
  Verifies ddx install (no --global, convention mode) installs to
  ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<identity>/plugins/<name>/ and creates project-tier
  links pointing into that XDG plugins path.
  PASSES.

AC3 — TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode in cli/cmd/install_global_test.go
  Verifies ddx update (no --global) updates the project install in both in-tree and
  convention modes.
  PASSES.

Implementation details already in place:
- cli/cmd/install.go resolveInstallDirs() uses ddxroot.Path() for project-local installRoot
- cli/cmd/install.go installLocal() uses ddxroot.Path() for the plugin directory in project mode
- cli/cmd/update.go performGlobalUpdate() correctly routes global updates through ddxroot.GlobalDir()
- cli/cmd/update.go performUpdate() calls refreshShippedSkills() which correctly writes to the project dir

Full test suite (go test ./cmd/... -timeout 600s) passes in ~6 minutes on this machine.
The prior 120s timeout used in testing was too short for the concurrent test load.
